title: Notion Project Management Template — Pro Hub
description:
Stop letting projects fall apart across Slack threads, spreadsheets, and sticky notes. This all-in-one Notion Project Management Template gives teams, freelancers, and agencies a single source of truth for every project they run.

Built around six fully relational databases — Projects, Tasks, Milestones, Team Members, Meeting Notes, and Risks & Issues — this template automatically calculates budget remaining, completion percentages, days overdue, and team workload without any manual number-crunching.

Whether you're a product manager juggling five simultaneous launches, a freelance consultant tracking deliverables across ten clients, or an operations lead standardizing how your agency runs every engagement, this template scales to fit your workflow.

Get instant visibility into project health with RAG status indicators, a milestone timeline, a personal task board filtered to you, and a risk register that catches problems before they become disasters. Every meeting note is linked to its project. Every task rolls up to a milestone. Every dollar spent updates your budget automatically.

No Notion expertise required — just duplicate, fill in your projects, and start shipping.
features: Six interconnected relational databases (Projects, Tasks, Milestones, Team Members, Meeting Notes, Risks & Issues) give you a complete 360° view of every project in one workspace.
Auto-calculated budget tracking rolls up actual task costs into each project so you always know exactly how much budget remains without touching a spreadsheet.
Smart task management with dependency tracking (Blocked By / Blocking relations), sprint labels, Days Overdue formula, and a personal Kanban board filtered to your assignments.
Proactive risk and issue register with a Risk Score formula that multiplies severity by probability, so your most dangerous threats are always prioritized at the top.
Centralized meeting notes database links decisions and action items directly back to their parent project and spawns trackable tasks instantly, so nothing falls through the cracks after a call.
